name: meok-cra-annex-iv-classifier-mcp
summary: EU Cyber Resilience Act product classifier MCP. Classifies PDEs into CRA hierarchy (default / Class I / Class II / Annex IV per Implementing Reg 2025/2392), audits the 15 Annex I cybersecurity requirements, generates Annex VIII technical docs skeleton, emits HMAC-signed classification certs. Built for 11 Dec 2027 enforcement. By MEOK AI Labs.
